---
title: "Blog"
listing:
  contents: blog
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  fields: [title, date, categories, description]
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: true
  feed:
    items: 10
    type: partial
---

::: {.page-intro}
Sosyal girisimcilik, sosyal politika, emek piyasalari ve akademik calismalar uzerine notlarim.
:::

::: {.section-shell}
## Topics

This blog gathers writing on labour markets, social entrepreneurship, social policy, occupational safety, and current debates connected to academic and public life.
:::

::: {.section-shell}
## Latest Posts
:::
